summary: EXP-301 delivers the operator-commissioned WIN-013/014 verdict reframe to Refuted by Data and adds a new Part 6.14 κ Coupling Cluster section that anchors the cross-eclipse refutation argument. ISS-1870 originally flagged that WIN-013 still showed Misleading after WIN-014 was upgraded; this expansion brings WIN-013 to Refuted by Data and reframes WIN-014 from Self-Contradicted to Refuted by Data with consistent reasoning (the κ-coupling vise: dome publishes κ as a structural constant, applies through past eclipses to predict several-µGal SG pulses, SGs measured zero — refuted by data; every carve-out also destroys PRED-TIER-3). ISS-1870 should close on integration of EXP-301 patches.
notes: Operator HNOTE explicitly requested operator review of drafted verdicts before curmudgeon clears. Decider should route to operator review (not directly to curmudgeon) per HNOTE-OPERATOR-WIN-013-014-VERDICT-REFRAME-001 paragraph: "Operator (me) wants to read the rewritten verdicts before curmudgeon clears — please make the EXP a single integrated proposal so I can review the analyst draft in one sitting, not split across multiple smaller EXPs."
